name: x-deck-lab
description: Root-only mobile Beyblade X deck builder with guided kid-friendly steps, owned-opponent testing, one ordinary Self-KO Yes/No answer, physics-informed deck ranking, and tournament-readiness analysis.

scripts.check: node --check data.js && node --check core.js && node --check app.js && node --check service-worker.js && node --test test.mjs
